paper.title: Prediction of corrosion-induced cover cracking in reinforced concrete structures
paper.notes: Packet does not provide cementitious compressive-strength results suitable for extraction.

evidence.evidence_text: The anisotropy of cracked concrete was considered in the model developed by Li et al. [19].
